sourceMovie.title: Security
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Security (2017) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Alain Desrochers's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Colombiana
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Security clicked for you, Colombiana (2011) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Security?
faq.answer: Try Colombiana, The International, The Killer—each shares DNA with Security while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Security?
faq.answer: Security (2017) is best described as Action, Thriller, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Security worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
